# PermitGraph

PermitGraph is a local permit gate for AI agents. It scans repositories before agents receive tools, credentials, memory, CI permissions, or production access.

## Canonical Human Docs

- Introduction: /docs
- Quickstart: /docs/quickstart
- First Scan Walkthrough: /docs/first-scan-walkthrough
- Agent Permit Model: /docs/agent-permit-model
- Finding Statuses: /docs/finding-statuses
- Policy Checks: /docs/policy-checks
- Evidence and Artifacts: /docs/evidence-and-artifacts
- Deep Agent Review: /docs/deep-agent-review
- Scan a Repository: /docs/scan-a-repository
- Review Findings: /docs/review-findings
- Configure Policy: /docs/configure-policy
- Run in GitHub Actions: /docs/run-in-github-actions
- Export Proof Packs: /docs/export-proof-packs
- CLI Reference: /docs/cli-reference
- Artifact Reference: /docs/artifact-reference
- AI Analysis Guide: /docs/ai-analysis-guide
- Rule Reference: /docs/rule-reference
- SARIF Output: /docs/sarif-output
- Baseline Mode: /docs/baseline-mode
- Security Boundaries: /docs/security-boundaries
- Redaction: /docs/redaction
- Observability: /docs/observability
- Cost Controls: /docs/cost-controls
- Roadmap: /docs/roadmap
- Hosted Product Boundary: /docs/hosted-product-boundary

## AI Analysis Entry Points

- Agent guide: AGENTS.md
- Artifact guide: docs/artifact-reference.md
- AI analysis guide: docs/ai-analysis-guide.md
- README quickstart: README.md

## Core Rule For AI Agents

Scanner artifacts are source of truth. Deep Agent reports explain and cite evidence; they do not create standalone truth.

## Main Commands

```bash
uv run agent-permit scan . --ci --exclude "tests/fixtures/**"
uv run agent-permit rules
uv run --extra deep-agent agent-permit investigate .agent-permit/runs/<run_id>
python3 tools/release_check.py
```

## Safety Notes

- Do not execute target repository agent code during scanner work.
- Do not publish `.agent-permit/` runs without redaction review.
- Do not expose raw secret values.
- Do not treat `approved` as a complete security audit.
- Do not treat `needs_review` as failure.
